name: Image transform failure rate — variants not generating

_baseworks_meta.slo_note: Issue Alert (modelled on high-error-rate.json): fires when >=20 image-transform job failures (captured by the worker on('failed') ErrorTracker, tagged queue=image-transform) occur within a 5m window — a real signal works today without custom metrics. Most common cause is a non-glibc worker base image breaking sharp's native binding (see image-transform-failure.md / file-storage.md). Corrupt/hostile single inputs self-heal via BullMQ retries and should not, alone, breach this threshold.
